description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sdl2-examples that runs on push to all branches except markdown files, on pull requests to all branches except markdown files, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs, cmake and make, each running on ubuntu-latest with a matrix strategy. The cmake job checks out the repository, installs dependencies, and builds using cmake and ninja for multiple C++ versions. The make job checks out the repository, installs dependencies including crystal and mono, and builds using make for multiple C and C++ versions and other languages.
